name: alumni-manager
displayDescription: Full-stack student information management system for Vietnamese universities. Needed to help university admins track graduates, generate reports, and manage alumni data at scale. Features dashboard analytics, Elasticsearch-powered full-text search, Excel import/export, and role-based access control via Better Auth. Contains 2 parts: React + MUI + Redux Toolkit frontend, and Express.js + Prisma + PostgreSQL backend. Used by university administrative staff. Dockerized with production compose.
